title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Apollo Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
